title: FREST | BRAND IDENTITY & NAMING :: Behance
metaDescription: FREST is a modern skincare brand. The project includes the development of naming, logo, packaging, and a cohesive visual identity.
bodyText: PULAR PARA O CONTEГҡDO PRINCIPAL PULAR PARA O RODAPГү Acesse behance.net Explorar Carreiras Recursos Contratar Experimente grГЎtis Fazer logon Acesse adobe.com Seguir Contratar Ferramentas Salvar Compartilhar Curtir FREST | BRAND IDENTITY & NAMING Veronika Meleshchuk рҹҮәрҹҮҰ вҖў Seguir FREST BRAND IDENTITY & NAMING PROJECTвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢвҖӢ FREST is a modern self-care brand built around the idea of freshness, rest, and effortless quality. The name is derived from fresh and rest, with an implied sense of best вҖ”reflecting a balanced approach to everyday care that feels calm, clean, and intentional. The brand focuses on creating a moment of pause in daily routines вҖ” a quiet, refreshing ritual that reconnects the body and mind. The visual identity is based on simplicity and clarity. That is why the design took on a minimalist and clean form: it emphasizes a sense of pause, lightness, and effortless quality without unnecessary visual noise. THANK YOU FOR WATCHING!
